2321060.name: AI Cards
2321060.description:
Welcome to a beautiful world of card memorization!


Immerse yourself in stunning Midjourney landscapes while testing your memory skills with this relaxing 3D card game. With Chat GPT's advanced C# scripting, the AI-generated levels will challenge you, while a text-based story will keep you engaged in between matches.

Flip cards over to reveal potential matches and match them all to win.


With gorgeous graphics and easy-to-use controls, this game is perfect for players of all ages and experience levels. Get ready to exercise your memory while enjoying a captivating world of card-matching!

100% of card artwork and scripts were developed using AI.
2321060.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
